hooks.name: lint-on-save
hooks.instruction: Run the linter on this file and fix any issues

hooks.name: security-scan-pre-commit
hooks.instruction: Run Semgrep on all staged files. Report any critical or high findings.

hooks.name: debug-on-test-failure
hooks.instruction: Analyse the test failure output. Determine if the test or the code is wrong. Suggest a fix.

hooks.name: dependency-scan
hooks.instruction: Run dependency vulnerability scan on the changed package file.

hooks.name: doc-review-on-pr
hooks.instruction: Review the PR diff. If any public API changed, check that documentation is updated.
